description: Hunter surprises May at her father’s home, resulting in a tense reunion. He tries to recruit May to help him take down Ward and revive S.H.I.E.L.D.’s pursuit of Hydra, but May is initially resistant, citing her father’s needs. Their exchange reveals both May’s desire for a normal life and Hunter’s determination to seek justice against Ward, foreshadowing May’s eventual return to action.

transcript.line: What the hell are you doing here?
